---
title: "Sophia Angelene Santos"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: pfp.JPG
  links: 
    - text: Creative Website
      href: https://sophiangelene18.wordpress.com/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/sophiangelene
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: www.linkedin.com/in/sophiangelene18
    - icon: inbox-fill
      text: Email
      href: mailto:sophiangelene@g.ucla.edu
    - text: Resume
      href: resume.pdf
toc: false
---

Hello. My name is Sophia, and I am a 4th year undergraduate student at UCLA. I am majoring in Statistics and Data Science with a minor in Digital Humanities. Through my courses and extra cirricular projects at UCLA, I have compiled skills in data analysis, machine learning, business strategy, project management, humanities research, and more. Welcome to my academic profile!


## Education
#### **UCLA**  
*B.S. Statistics and Data Science, Minor in Digital Humanities*  
Expected June 2026

#### **College of the Canyons, Valencia**  
*Dual Enrollment Coursework*  
2020-2022  

#### **Canyon High School**  
*High School Diploma*  
2018-2022
